painPoints.qualityDesc: WhatsApp and Instagram crush your photos down to nothing. Say goodbye to printable resolution.

painPoints.solution: LensParty fixes all of this — for free.

faq.label: Got Questions?
faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: Do guests need to download an app?
faq.a1: No app required. Guests simply scan the QR code with their phone's camera and upload directly from their browser. It works on any modern smartphone — iOS, Android, or anything else.
faq.q2: What does the Starter plan include?
faq.a2: The Starter plan ($19.99/event) gives you 1 event with up to 200 photos, 100 guests, 60-day upload window, and 12-month storage. Perfect for smaller events like birthday parties or baby showers.
faq.a3: Starter plan stores photos for 12 months. Pro plan stores them for 24 months, and Business extends to 36 months. You can always download a full ZIP backup at any time.
faq.q4: Can I download all photos at once?
faq.a4: Yes! The host dashboard has a 'Download All' button that packages every photo into a ZIP file. Guests can also download individual photos directly from the gallery.
faq.q5: Is it available in other languages?
faq.a5: Yes! LensParty automatically detects your browser language. We currently support English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, and Arabic.
faq.q6: How does the AI face search work?
faq.a6: After uploading a reference selfie, our AI scans all event photos to find ones that contain that person's face. Results appear in seconds. Available on Pro and Business plans.
faq.q7: Is my data private and secure?
faq.a7: Absolutely. All photos are stored in enterprise-grade encrypted cloud storage. Your photos are 100% owned by you and your guests. We never share, sell, or use your content.
faq.a8: Yes. All paid plans come with a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, contact us and we'll refund your payment — no questions asked.
